description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gnar/base:1.0 Docker image and sets the PYTHONPATH variable to /builds/gnaar. Define a single stage named test. Add a test job in the test stage that runs, in order, pip3 install --upgrade pip setuptools codecov, pip3 install -r app/requirements.txt, pip3 install -r test/requirements.txt, pytest, and codecov --token=aefc1c85-dfc0-4bbc-9afe-5e7308ba08f3. The job has no caches, artifacts, services, or special rules.
